scenario.name: boots_and_reveals_boss
scenario.description: the boss is the Mode 7 BG: it boots ($7E:E000=SFDB), the heartbeat advances, and during the REVEAL the affine matrix scales the whole plane so the on-screen boss grows from tiny to full (the boss-is-BG scaling invariant). The player sprite (OAM slot 0) composites in front once the fight begins.

scenario.name: hp_hud_renders_over_boss
scenario.description: the boss HP bar is a row of 8 segment sprites (OAM slots 9-16) drawn at the top of the screen with priority 2, so it composites IN FRONT of the Mode 7 boss BG. At full HP all 8 segments are the lit tile (SPR_HP_LIT = 6).
